glosses.vi: dự trữ; khu bảo tồn thiên nhiên

sentences.target: On a une réserve de pâtes à la maison.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a yn ʁe.zɛʁv də pɑt a la mɛ.zɔ̃/

translations.fr: On a une réserve de pâtes à la maison.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a yn ʁe.zɛʁv də pɑt a la mɛ.zɔ̃/
translations.en: We have a stock of pasta at home.
translations.es: Tenemos una provisión de pasta en casa.
translations.de: Wir haben einen Vorrat an Nudeln zu Hause.
translations.it: Abbiamo una scorta di pasta a casa.
translations.ru: У нас дома есть запас макарон.
translations.pt: Temos uma reserva de massa em casa.
translations.vi: Nhà mình có dự trữ mì ống.
translations.ar: لدينا مخزون من المعكرونة في المنزل.
translations.nl: We hebben thuis een voorraad pasta.
translations.uk: У нас вдома є запас макарон.
translations.hi: घर में पास्ता का भंडार है।
translations.nb: Vi har et lager av pasta hjemme.
translations.id: Kami punya stok pasta di rumah.
translations.sv: Vi har ett lager av pasta hemma.
translations.ro: Avem o rezervă de paste acasă.
translations.da: Vi har et lager af pasta derhjemme.
translations.ja: 家にパスタのストックがあります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'.
Main verb (présent, 3rd person singular) expressing possession; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article (feminine singular) introducing the noun 'réserve' as the direct object.
Common noun (fem. sg.), head of the direct object; here meaning a stock or supply.
Preposition introducing a noun complement that specifies the content of 'réserve'.
Plural noun (fem. pl.), complement of 'de' specifying what the reserve consists of.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (fem. sg.) determining 'maison' within the locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun (fem. sg.), object of the preposition 'à'; forms the adverbial locative 'à la maison'.

sentences.target: Nous visitons la réserve naturelle demain matin.
sentences.reading: /nu vi.zi.tɔ̃ la ʁe.zɛʁv na.ty.ʁɛl də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Nous visitons la réserve naturelle demain matin.
translations.ipa: /nu vi.zi.tɔ̃ la ʁe.zɛʁv na.ty.ʁɛl də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re visiting the nature reserve tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Mañana por la mañana visitamos la reserva natural.
translations.de: Morgen früh besuchen wir das Naturschutzgebiet.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 아침 자연 보호구역을 방문해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天早上去参观自然保护区。
translations.yue: 我哋聽朝早去參觀自然保護區。
translations.pt: Vamos visitar a reserva natural amanhã de manhã.
translations.tr: Yarın sabah doğa koruma alanını ziyaret ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Sáng mai chúng tôi sẽ đi thăm khu bảo tồn thiên nhiên.
translations.hu: Holnap reggel meglátogatjuk a természetvédelmi területet.
translations.hi: हम कल सुबह प्रकृति अभयारण्य का दौरा करेंगे।
translations.el: Αύριο το πρωί θα επισκεφτούμε το φυσικό καταφύγιο.
translations.nb: I morgen tidlig besøker vi naturreservatet.
translations.id: Besok pagi kami akan mengunjungi cagar alam.
translations.sv: I morgon bitti besöker vi naturreservatet.
translations.da: I morgen tidlig besøger vi naturreservatet.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、自然保護区を訪れます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person plural).
Main verb (présent, 1st person plural), transitive; takes a direct object.
Definite article (fem. sg.) introducing the direct object noun 'réserve'.
Common noun (fem. sg.), head of the direct object; here the protected area (to be specified by the adjective).
Adjective (fem. sg.) post-nominal, modifying 'réserve' to form 'réserve naturelle'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; part of the expression 'demain matin'.
Noun (masc. sg.) in a fixed temporal expression 'demain matin'; functions as an adverbial time complement.

sentences.target: Elle montre de la réserve avec eux.
sentences.reading: /ɛl mɔ̃tʁ də la ʁe.zɛʁv a.vɛk ø/

translations.fr: Elle montre de la réserve avec eux.
translations.ipa: /ɛl mɔ̃tʁ də la ʁe.zɛʁv a.vɛk ø/
translations.en: She shows some reserve with them.
translations.es: Se muestra algo reservada con ellos.
translations.de: Sie ist ihnen gegenüber etwas zurückhaltend.
translations.it: Con loro è un po' riservata.
translations.ko: 그녀는 그들 앞에서는 조금은 거리를 둬요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她对他们表现得有些拘谨。
translations.yue: 佢對佢哋顯得有啲拘謹。
translations.ru: Она с ними ведёт себя сдержанно.
translations.pt: Ela é um pouco reservada com eles.
translations.vi: Cô ấy tỏ ra khá dè dặt với họ.
translations.nl: Ze is wat gereserveerd gegenüber hen.
translations.hi: वह उनके साथ कुछ संकोच दिखाती है।
translations.nb: Hun er litt reservert overfor dem.
translations.id: Dia bersikap agak tertutup terhadap mereka.
translations.sv: Hon är lite reserverad mot dem.
translations.ro: Ea este puțin rezervată față de ei.
translations.da: Hun er lidt reserveret over for dem.
translations.fi: Hän on heitä kohtaan hieman pidättyväinen.
translations.ja: 彼女は彼らに対して少し控えめだ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, feminine).
Main verb (présent, 3rd person singular), transitive; selects a direct object.
Preposition forming a partitive construction with 'la' before an abstract/mass noun.
Determiner used with 'de' to form the partitive article 'de la' before 'réserve'.
Common noun (fem. sg.), direct object within the partitive 'de la réserve'; denotes restraint.
Preposition introducing a comitative prepositional phrase.
Stressed pronoun (3rd person plural), object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: La voiture est sur la réserve.

translations.fr: La voiture est sur la réserve.
translations.en: The car is on reserve fuel.
translations.vi: Xe đang chạy bằng nhiên liệu dự trữ.
translations.hi: गाड़ी रिज़र्व ईंधन पर चल रही है।
translations.id: Mobil berjalan dengan bahan bakar cadangan.
translations.ja: 車は予備燃料で走っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (fem. sg.) determining the subject noun 'voiture'.
Common noun (fem. sg.), subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (présent, 3rd person singular) linking the subject to a predicative complement.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase that serves as the predicative complement.
Definite article (fem. sg.) within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun (fem. sg.), head of the NP inside the PP 'sur la réserve'; here refers to the fuel reserve.
